name: React Component Patterns
description: Common React component patterns for detection and suggestion

patterns.name: Compound Component
patterns.description: Parent provides context, children consume it. Great for Select, Tabs, Accordion, Menu.

patterns.name: Higher-Order Component
patterns.description: Wrap a component to inject props or behavior. Use sparingly -- prefer hooks for most cases.

patterns.name: Render Props / Children as Function
patterns.description: Component accepts a render function as children or prop. Useful for headless behavior injection.

patterns.name: forwardRef Component
patterns.description: Component that forwards ref to an inner DOM element. Required for ref-based integrations.

patterns.name: Generic TypeScript Component
patterns.description: Component with generic type parameter for type-safe data rendering (List, Table, Select).

patterns.name: Controlled + Uncontrolled Dual Mode
patterns.description: Component supports both controlled (value+onChange) and uncontrolled (defaultValue) modes.

patterns.name: Polymorphic Component (as prop)
patterns.description: Component that renders as a different HTML element or component via 'as' prop.

patterns.name: Error Boundary
patterns.description: Class component that catches JavaScript errors in child tree and shows fallback UI.

patterns.name: Slot Pattern (Named Children)
patterns.description: Component accepts named slots for flexible layout composition.
